title: Add a Money-Back Guarantee Badge
description: Add a 30-day money-back guarantee badge to all pricing cards.
solution: Add a div with position:absolute, top:.5rem, right:.5rem containing the guarantee text.

title: Build a Live Total Price Calculator
description: Create a calculator that shows the total based on plan + users + billing period.
hints: Update total on any input change
Use data attributes for plan prices
solution: Calculate total = planPrice * users * (isYearly ? 12 * 0.8 : 1). Display formatted result. Update on any input change.

title: Implement Plan Comparison Checkmarks with Tooltips
description: Add tooltip explanations for each feature in the comparison table.
hints: position: relative on cell, absolute on tooltip
solution: Add data-tooltip to each td. On hover/focus, show a positioned tooltip div with the attribute value. Use ::after pseudo-element for the tooltip arrow.
